Description: Dose response analysis for ADAS-Cog changes from Baseline
Documentation:
Accordingly, the dose response for the change from baseline at Week 24,
adjusted for site and baseline score is not statistically significantly different from 0.
Pairwise comparisons among the treatment groups are also presented.
